series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains the Ohio Department of Transportation''s Office of Aviation Bill Detail Report. This report is generated from the Office of Aviation''s Flight Scheduler System. The report contains date of flight, agency, office supported, aircraft, crew, pax (passengers), mission details, trip breakdown, rate, extended rate, debt, summary of office support, summary for agency and report summary.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain four (4) years plus current year, then destroy; unless the record series is currently being audited by the Auditor of State, then destroy once the audit report is released. ; Paper: Retain paper documents until scanned electronically., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
